examples: It just keeps piling up higher and higher.
Meg was already covering the buckwheats and piling the bread into one big plate.
In the past, whole cities grew from the arduous task of cutting and piling stone upon.
It was one-sided from start to finish, Newport piling up a 36-0 half-time lead.
In an otherwise ugly equity market today, investors are piling in to optical networking component stocks.
